description: A customer wants to update the phone number and email address on their account.

nodes.task_description: Authenticate the customer's identity using security questions.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully verifies the customer's identity.

nodes.task_description: Collect the new phone number and email address.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent accurately records the new contact details.

nodes.task_description: Update the customer's profile in the customer information system (CIS).

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully updates the information in the system.
